kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Pokemon data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.

kw.name: Pokemon Name Should Be
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Verifies that a Pokemon response contains the expected name by extracting and comparing the name field from the JSON response.

kw.name: Pokemon Should Exist
Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Verifies that a Pokemon exists in the PokeAPI by checking that the response status code is 200 (OK).

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Given the PokeAPI is available When we request pokemon Pikachu Then the pokemon exists and the name is correct

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Pokemon data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.

kw.name: Pokemon Name Should Be
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Pokemon Should Exist
Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Verifies that a Pokemon exists in the PokeAPI by checking that the response status code is 200 (OK).

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Pokemon Should Exist
Should Be Equal As Integers

Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Pokemon data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.

kw.name: Pokemon Should Exist
Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Verifies that a Pokemon exists in the PokeAPI by checking that the response status code is 200 (OK).

kw.name: Pokemon Should Have Type
Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Verifies that a Pokemon response contains the expected type by extracting all types from the response and checking if the expected type is present.

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Pokemon data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.

kw.name: Pokemon Should Exist
Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Verifies that a Pokemon exists in the PokeAPI by checking that the response status code is 200 (OK).

kw.name: Pokemon Should Have Type
Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Verifies that a Pokemon response contains the expected type by extracting all types from the response and checking if the expected type is present.

kw.name: Pokemon Should Have Type
kw.doc: Verifies that a Pokemon response contains the expected type by extracting all types from the response and checking if the expected type is present.

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Pokemon Should Have One Type
Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.
Verifies that a Pokemon response contains exactly one type by checking the length of the types array.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Pokemon data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.
Extracts and returns the JSON data from a Pokemon API response. This is useful for schema validation and direct data inspection.

kw.name: Validate Json
kw.doc: Validates the sample JSON against the given schema.
Validates that a Pokemon's API response matches the expected JSON schema, ensuring all required fields and types are correct. Fetches the Pokemon data and validates against the provided schema.

Get Pokemon Json

Validates that a Pokemon's API response matches the expected JSON schema, ensuring all required fields and types are correct. Fetches the Pokemon data and validates against the provided schema.

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Pokemon data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.
Extracts and returns the JSON data from a Pokemon API response. This is useful for schema validation and direct data inspection.

kw.name: Validate Json
kw.doc: Validates the sample JSON against the given schema.
Validates that a Pokemon's API response matches the expected JSON schema, ensuring all required fields and types are correct. Fetches the Pokemon data and validates against the provided schema.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Given the PokeAPI is available When we request data for multiple Pokemon Then all responses should match the Pokemon schema

test.name: Validate Pokemon Types Schema

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Type data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.
Extracts and returns the JSON data from a Type API response. This is useful for schema validation and direct data inspection.

kw.name: Validate Json
kw.doc: Validates the sample JSON against the given schema.
Validates that a Type's API response matches the expected JSON schema, ensuring all required fields and types are correct. Fetches the Type data and validates against the provided schema.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Given the PokeAPI is available When we request Type data (e.g., Fire) Then the response structure should match the Type schema

suite.doc:
Validates Pokemon API response schemas
This test suite ensures that API responses from PokeAPI conform to the expected JSON schemas, helping catch breaking changes or data structure inconsistencies.
Schemas validate: - Required fields are present - Field data types are correct - Nested structures are properly formed

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Type data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.

kw.name: Type Should Be Strong Against
kw.doc: Verifies that a type (weaker_type) is in the "double_damage_to" field from the response type.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Type data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.

kw.name: Type Has No Effect On
kw.doc: Verifies that a type has no effect on another type by checking the "no_damage_to" field from the response type.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Given the PokeAPI is available When we request Normal type Then Normal should have no effect on Ghost (Normal moves have no effect on Ghost)

test.name: Normal Is Immune To Ghost

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Fetches Type data from PokeAPI by name and returns the full response object.

kw.name: Type Should Be Immune To
kw.doc: Verifies that a type is immune to another type by checking the "no_damage_from" field from the response type.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Given the PokeAPI is available When we request Normal type Then Normal should be immune to Ghost (Ghost moves have no effect on Normal)

suite.doc: Pokemon Type Test Suite Includes tests for validating the type of a Pokemon.
